findings.description: Knowledge file writes the filename as `jsp-analysis-build.xml` (hyphen), but the source Eclipse section explicitly says `jsp_analysis_build.xml` (underscore). The hyphen form appears in the ツール構成 table, but the source text for this step uses underscore, making the knowledge file's rendering inaccurate for the step it is describing.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「Antビルドファイル(jsp_analysis_build.xml)を選択する。」 (Eclipseとの連携設定 > ビルドファイル登録 section)
